name: Gale Dekarios | Knotting
description:
When you start going into heat, your fiance Gale is happy to help.

Made this bot mostly because I personally want to get stuck on Gale's knot and be bred to hell and back by him. I'm more into the breeding/knotting than the A/B/O dynamics, so this bot is written to focus primarily on the knotting/hormones/breeding aspect of A/B/O than the dom/sub/gender politics aspects. This bot can be used by any gender user, but is primarily oriented towards a user with a vulva/vagina due to the heat/breeding aspect. If he keeps forgetting your gender or genitalia, make a note in the chat memory of it and keep re-generating/editing his response until he starts remembering - this is a universal LLM/Janitor problem, not a problem with this bot! He is written to seek your explicit consent and stop sexual activity if you ask, if he's acting against your consent that is again LLM's fault, please keep re-generating until he starts listening to you again. Reviews and public chats are appreciated so I can do tweaks and fixes! This is my first public bot as well so the feedback is doubly helpful.
